basic_details.job_title: WBPSC Miscellaneous Services Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for BWO, Revenue Inspector and More Posts
basic_details.total_vacancies: Assistant Child Development Project Officer, Disaster Management Officer, Block Youth Officer, Inspector Backward Classes Welfare, Assistant Agricultural Marketing Officer and many other posts
basic_details.short_information: Public Service Commission, West Bengal (WBPSC) has published the Miscellaneous Services Recruitment Examination 2024 Detailed Advertisement (No. 13/2024). The recruitment drive aims to fill vacancies for various posts including Assistant Child Development Project Officer, Disaster Management Officer, Block Youth Officer, Inspector Backward Classes Welfare, and many other Group-B & Group-C equivalent posts under Government of West Bengal. Candidates aged 20-39 years as on 01.01.2024, with a Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized University and ability to read, write & speak Bengali (except for Nep

application_fee.details: General / OBC: ₹160/- (plus service charges wherever applicable) SC / ST of West Bengal & PwBD (40% and above): Nil (exempted) Payment through online mode only. | No claim for refund of fee will be entertained.

qualification.details: Nationality: Candidate must be a citizen of India or such other nationals as declared eligible by the Govt. of India. | Essential Educational Qualification (as on closing date) | A degree from a recognized University or its equivalent. Ability to read, write and speak in Bengali (not required for candidates whose mother tongue is Nepali). Knowledge of Bengali will be tested at the time of Personality Test for candidates whose mother tongue is other than Bengali/Nepali. | N.B. : Candidates must fulfill the requisite qualifications by the closing date of submission of application. | Crucial date: 01.01.2024 | Not below 20 years but not more than 39 years (i.e., born not earlier than 02.01.1985 and not later than 01.01.2004). | Age Relaxation: | SC & ST of West Bengal: 5 years OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) of West Bengal: 3 years Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD): Up to 45 years No relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates of other States (treated as General) | N.B. : Age as recorded only in the Madhyamik or equivalent certificate will be accepted.

salary_details.details: Besides pay, the posts carry allowances as admissible as per ROPA, 2019.

selection_process: The examination will be held in three successive stages:
Preliminary Examination (Objective Type) – Screening Test only Final Examination (Conventional Type – Written) Personality Test

Final merit list will be prepared on the basis of marks obtained in Final Examination and Personality Test taken together. Preliminary marks will not be counted for final selection. Negative marking for wrong answers in Preliminary Examination. Qualifying marks in aggregate (Written + Personality Test): UR/EWS – 40%
how_to_apply: Fill details, upload photo, signature & required certificates
Edit window available from 22.05.2026 to 28.05.2026 (once only)
important_instructions: Read the detailed advertisement and Scheme & Syllabus carefully before applying. Applications once submitted are final. No request for change in category or details will be entertained after closing date. Mobile phones, smart watches or any communication device are strictly prohibited in the examination hall. Candidates must have good health and character. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. If at any stage a candidate is found ineligible or has submitted false information, his/her candidature will be cancelled.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for WBPSC Miscellaneous Services Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for WBPSC Miscellaneous Services Recruitment 2026 is 20 May 2026 up to 3:00 p.m. Candidates must complete the application and fee payment before the deadline. Late submissions will not be accepted under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q2. What is the age limit for WBPSC Miscellaneous Services 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 20 and 39 years of age as on 01 January 2024. Age relaxation is available for SC, ST, OBC, and PwBD candidates as per rules. No relaxation is applicable for candidates of other states.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for WBPSC Miscellaneous Services Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized university or equivalent. They must also be able to read, write, and speak Bengali. This requirement is not mandatory for candidates whose mother tongue is Nepali.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for WBPSC Miscellaneous Services 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹160 for General and OBC candidates along with applicable service charges. SC, ST of West Bengal, and PwBD candidates are exempted from paying the fee. Payment must be made through online mode only.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for WBPSC Miscellaneous Services Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Preliminary Examination, Final Written Examination, and Personality Test. The preliminary exam is only for screening purposes. Final merit is based on marks obtained in the final exam and personality test.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are announced in WBPSC Miscellaneous Services 2026?
faq.answer: The total number of vacancies has not been announced yet by WBPSC. The vacancies will be updated later on the official website. Candidates are advised to check regularly for updates.

faq.question: Q7. When will the WBPSC Miscellaneous Services 2026 exam be conducted?
faq.answer: The exam dates for Preliminary, Final, and Personality Test are yet to be announced. All updates will be published on the WBPSC official website. Candidates should stay updated for official notifications.

faq.question: Q8. How to apply for WBPSC Miscellaneous Services Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the official WBPSC website by filling out the application form. They need to upload required documents and pay the application fee. The application must be submitted before the closing date.

faq.question: Q9. Is Bengali language compulsory for WBPSC Miscellaneous Services 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must know how to read, write, and speak Bengali. However, this condition is not applicable to candidates whose mother tongue is Nepali. Language proficiency may be tested during the Personality Test.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for WBPSC Miscellaneous Services 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need to provide documents such as age proof, educational certificates, and category certificates. Valid ID proof and other supporting documents must also be submitted. All documents will be verified during the selection process.
